name: Links — utility links page renders and links have valid targets

planSteps.description: Wait up to 10 seconds for the page to render
The page renders without an error boundary, blank screen, 404, or stack traces

Any anchor (<a>) elements or link-style buttons on the page have visible link text (not 'undefined', 'null', or empty) and have non-empty href values. Links must NOT point to 'javascript:void(0)' as a placeholder or to '#' with no handler behind them
The page has a clear title or header explaining what these links are (e.g., 'Resources', 'External Links', 'Community') — the user should understand what they're looking at without guessing
